short_text: Starc to Russell, , low full toss and the blasted over long-on. That was another monumental hit. Huge six and a little m
full_text: Starc to Russell, , low full toss and the blasted over long-on. That was another monumental hit. Huge six and a little momentum for the defending champions to end the innings.

short_text: Starc to Russell, , why do we have boundaries when Dre Russ bats? Why don't we have homerun in cricket? This man evokes
full_text: Starc to Russell, , why do we have boundaries when Dre Russ bats? Why don't we have homerun in cricket? This man evokes such rhetorical questions. That was short, Russell backed away and thumped the pull over deep mid. Windies breach the 150 mark

short_text: Starc to Holder, 1 run, spears in the yorker from round the wicket and Holder fails to get under it. Mistimes the drive
full_text: Starc to Holder, 1 run, spears in the yorker from round the wicket and Holder fails to get under it. Mistimes the drive into the off-side for a single

short_text: Starc to Russell, 1 run, cue-ends the pull down to long-on and the ball lands short of the fielder. Only a single
full_text: Starc to Russell, 1 run, cue-ends the pull down to long-on and the ball lands short of the fielder. Only a single

short_text: Starc to Pollard, Caught by Maxwell!! Good knock from the skipper has come to an end. That was a fuller ball, Pollard ba
full_text: Starc to Pollard, Caught by Maxwell!! Good knock from the skipper has come to an end. That was a fuller ball, Pollard backs away a little and wanted to slog. The ball went up and the man at long-on took an easy catch. That was right up there and the batter wanted to slam it big but failed to. Windies not getting those big runs at the end.

short_text: Starc to Pollard, no run, what happened there? Pollard wanted to paddle it away but the fuller ball outdoes him. Pollard
full_text: Starc to Pollard, no run, what happened there? Pollard wanted to paddle it away but the fuller ball outdoes him. Pollard lost his balance and almost tumbled over. A little bit helped him to survive that

short_text: Cummins to Russell, no run, slower bumper, sticks to the deck and Russell looking to pull ends up missing it. Dot ball t
full_text: Cummins to Russell, no run, slower bumper, sticks to the deck and Russell looking to pull ends up missing it. Dot ball to end the over

short_text: Cummins to Pollard, 1 run, powers the clip off the pads and the man at deep square cuts it off. That was hit hard but st
full_text: Cummins to Pollard, 1 run, powers the clip off the pads and the man at deep square cuts it off. That was hit hard but straight to the fielder

short_text: Cummins to Russell, 1 run, slaps a short and wide ball to the man at deep cover for a single. That was dragged down shor
full_text: Cummins to Russell, 1 run, slaps a short and wide ball to the man at deep cover for a single. That was dragged down short and Russell hit it hard and straight to the fielder

short_text: Cummins to Russell, no run, in the slot but quick and Russell misses the heave. Gets an inside edge and the ball dribble
full_text: Cummins to Russell, no run, in the slot but quick and Russell misses the heave. Gets an inside edge and the ball dribbles past the sticks to the keeper

short_text: Cummins to Russell, , good stuff all around. Superb delivery aimed at the toes and Russell did well to glance it fine. J
full_text: Cummins to Russell, , good stuff all around. Superb delivery aimed at the toes and Russell did well to glance it fine. Just got enough wood on it to send it fine past the man at 45 degrees

short_text: Cummins to Pollard, 1 run, low full toss on the pads, clipped away to fine leg for a single
full_text: Cummins to Pollard, 1 run, low full toss on the pads, clipped away to fine leg for a single

short_text: Hazlewood to Pollard, 1 run, rockets one down to long-on on a few bounces for a single. Was a length delivery and Pollar
full_text: Hazlewood to Pollard, 1 run, rockets one down to long-on on a few bounces for a single. Was a length delivery and Pollard slammed it down the ground

short_text: Hazlewood to Pollard, , glances that fine and gets a four despite the dive from the man at fine leg. That was a length d
full_text: Hazlewood to Pollard, , glances that fine and gets a four despite the dive from the man at fine leg. That was a length delivery but strayed on to the pads for the batter to tickle it away

short_text: Hazlewood to Pollard, , too full, too wide, wided by the ump
full_text: Hazlewood to Pollard, , too full, too wide, wided by the ump

short_text: Hazlewood to Pollard, , clipped away for a four! That was on to the pads and clipped away without any hassles
full_text: Hazlewood to Pollard, , clipped away for a four! That was on to the pads and clipped away without any hassles

short_text: Hazlewood to Dwayne Bravo, Caught by Warner!! Pollard almost puts an arm around DJ as he walks off. Zampa has a few kind
full_text: Hazlewood to Dwayne Bravo, Caught by Warner!! Pollard almost puts an arm around DJ as he walks off. Zampa has a few kind words. Dre Russ the batter walking in engulfs him in a hug. DJ Bravo is walking off for one last time in West Indian colours. He has been a messiah in this format. You just can't take your eyes off this man in the format be it batting or bowling. That was a slower delivery and Dwayne Bravo wanted to lift it down the ground but failed to scale a lot of distance. The man at long-off took a nice sliding catch.

short_text: Hazlewood to Pollard, 1 run, flogs that across the line and gets a single into the on-side off a fuller length delivery
full_text: Hazlewood to Pollard, 1 run, flogs that across the line and gets a single into the on-side off a fuller length delivery

short_text: Hazlewood to Pollard, 2 runs, that was right up there and the batter tried to slog it but got it off the inside edge for
full_text: Hazlewood to Pollard, 2 runs, that was right up there and the batter tried to slog it but got it off the inside edge for a couple

short_text: Cummins to Pollard, 1 run, slower and shorter. the batter combats it off the back foot and nudges it out into the on-sid
full_text: Cummins to Pollard, 1 run, slower and shorter. the batter combats it off the back foot and nudges it out into the on-side for a single

short_text: Cummins to Pollard, , short ball and that disappears. Wow! That was timed well as the ball was pulled away pretty well i
full_text: Cummins to Pollard, , short ball and that disappears. Wow! That was timed well as the ball was pulled away pretty well in the end. Looked more of a top-edge for a moment but that went easily over the fence

short_text: Cummins to Pollard, no run, bangs it in, too short and slow and Pollard is too early into the shot, toe-ends it back to
full_text: Cummins to Pollard, no run, bangs it in, too short and slow and Pollard is too early into the shot, toe-ends it back to Wade

short_text: Cummins to Pollard, , full toss, Pollard cracks that down the ground and Warner can't do anything this time as the ball
full_text: Cummins to Pollard, , full toss, Pollard cracks that down the ground and Warner can't do anything this time as the ball whistled away to the long-off fence

short_text: Cummins to Pollard, 2 runs, throws his bat at a wide one and Warner does superbly well to dive and stop it. He is such a
full_text: Cummins to Pollard, 2 runs, throws his bat at a wide one and Warner does superbly well to dive and stop it. He is such a presence on the field. That was brilliant. That was a poor ball outside off and Pollard thumped it over cover only for Warner to undo his efforts

short_text: Cummins to Dwayne Bravo, leg byes, 1 run, slower delivery angled in, the ball really stops on the batter and Dwayne Brav
full_text: Cummins to Dwayne Bravo, leg byes, 1 run, slower delivery angled in, the ball really stops on the batter and Dwayne Bravo was through with the pull too early. Gets hit high on the thigh and the ball rolls away into the off-side for a single

short_text: Starc to Dwayne Bravo, 1 run, full toss that swirls in the air a little and Dwayne Bravo ended up closing the face of th
full_text: Starc to Dwayne Bravo, 1 run, full toss that swirls in the air a little and Dwayne Bravo ended up closing the face of the bat too early. The ball went off the leading edge into the off-side for a single

short_text: Starc to Dwayne Bravo, , thumped! Wow! Might be his last game for the Windies in this format but this man can still hit
full_text: Starc to Dwayne Bravo, , thumped! Wow! Might be his last game for the Windies in this format but this man can still hit them big and sweet. Pitched up delivery as Starc missed his mark but Dwayne Bravo was ready as he lifted that over cover for a sixer. Good hit indeed

short_text: Starc to Dwayne Bravo, no run, in the blockhole outside off, Dwayne Bravo chips down and looks to jam it out but fails t
full_text: Starc to Dwayne Bravo, no run, in the blockhole outside off, Dwayne Bravo chips down and looks to jam it out but fails to wood it. Superb delivery as that was bowled at 146 clicks. He is cranking up some good pace

short_text: Starc to Pollard, 1 run, hops up and tucks this chest high short ball behind square on the on-side for a single
full_text: Starc to Pollard, 1 run, hops up and tucks this chest high short ball behind square on the on-side for a single

short_text: Starc to Dwayne Bravo, 1 run, fullish delivery, Dwayne Bravo yorks the ball out to the man at cover and sets off. They g
full_text: Starc to Dwayne Bravo, 1 run, fullish delivery, Dwayne Bravo yorks the ball out to the man at cover and sets off. They get a single and wanted a second but was sent back. Starc managed to get hold of the ball on the throw but failed to palm it on to the sticks. Dwayne Bravo is safe

short_text: Starc to Pollard, 1 run, low full toss angled across, Pollard times the ball down to find the dive of the man at mid-off
full_text: Starc to Pollard, 1 run, low full toss angled across, Pollard times the ball down to find the dive of the man at mid-off

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Dwayne Bravo, no run, length delivery and has been stabbed back to the bowler off the inner half of th
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Dwayne Bravo, no run, length delivery and has been stabbed back to the bowler off the inner half of the bat

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Pollard, 1 run, and Bravo was in disarray there. He almost was cleaned up by the powerful swat down th
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Pollard, 1 run, and Bravo was in disarray there. He almost was cleaned up by the powerful swat down the ground. That was hit really hard and the batter somehow got out of the firing line

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Pollard, 2 runs, back of a length delivery and has been tucked away behind square for a couple
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Pollard, 2 runs, back of a length delivery and has been tucked away behind square for a couple

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Pollard, no run, fuller, wider, Pollard throws his bat at it and ends up finding the man at cover
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Pollard, no run, fuller, wider, Pollard throws his bat at it and ends up finding the man at cover

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Pollard, no run, short, slower, the ball balloons over the swing of the bat and lobs into the gloves a
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Pollard, no run, short, slower, the ball balloons over the swing of the bat and lobs into the gloves as Wade dived forward to take it. May be landed on the bounce to the keeper

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Pollard, 2 runs, bangs it in, Pollard skips down and turns the ball away behind square on the on-side
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Pollard, 2 runs, bangs it in, Pollard skips down and turns the ball away behind square on the on-side for a couple of runs. Two more added to the tally

short_text: Zampa to Dwayne Bravo, no run, tossed up leggie and has been stabbed out into the off-side with soft hands
full_text: Zampa to Dwayne Bravo, no run, tossed up leggie and has been stabbed out into the off-side with soft hands

short_text: Zampa to Dwayne Bravo, no run, tossed up delivery and has been pushed out into the off-side with soft hands
full_text: Zampa to Dwayne Bravo, no run, tossed up delivery and has been pushed out into the off-side with soft hands

full_text: Zampa to Pollard, 1 run, on the pads and turned away into the on-side for a single

full_text: Zampa to Pollard, no run, flatter delivery and has been nudged out into the on-side

short_text: Zampa to Dwayne Bravo, 1 run, tossed up delivery and has been driven into the cover for a single as that spun away a lit
full_text: Zampa to Dwayne Bravo, 1 run, tossed up delivery and has been driven into the cover for a single as that spun away a little

short_text: Zampa to Dwayne Bravo, no run, defends it out into the on-side as that was at the sticks
full_text: Zampa to Dwayne Bravo, no run, defends it out into the on-side as that was at the sticks

short_text: Hazlewood to Dwayne Bravo, 1 run, back of a length on middle, clipped down to fine leg
full_text: Hazlewood to Dwayne Bravo, 1 run, back of a length on middle, clipped down to fine leg

short_text: Hazlewood to Hetmyer, Caught by Wade!! Hetmyer walks off without waiting for the umpire. Short ball down leg, has been g
full_text: Hazlewood to Hetmyer, Caught by Wade!! Hetmyer walks off without waiting for the umpire. Short ball down leg, has been gloved to the keeper. Steep bounce there which Hetmyer couldn't cope with as he tries to help it towards fine leg. So another batter failing to kick on in this innings.

short_text: Hazlewood to Pollard, 1 run, length ball slanted in at the stumps, Pollard turns it through midwicket
full_text: Hazlewood to Pollard, 1 run, length ball slanted in at the stumps, Pollard turns it through midwicket

short_text: Hazlewood to Hetmyer, 1 run, opens the face and guides it through point
full_text: Hazlewood to Hetmyer, 1 run, opens the face and guides it through point

short_text: Hazlewood to Hetmyer, 2 runs, back of a length around off, Hetmyer drives on the up through mid-off. Got it high on the
full_text: Hazlewood to Hetmyer, 2 runs, back of a length around off, Hetmyer drives on the up through mid-off. Got it high on the bat so the timing wasn't great. Long-on gets round to cut it off, sliding across at the boundary

short_text: Hazlewood to Hetmyer, no run, back of a length on leg, Hetmyer tucks it to midwicket
full_text: Hazlewood to Hetmyer, no run, back of a length on leg, Hetmyer tucks it to midwicket

short_text: Zampa to Pollard, , overpitched outside off and it's been put away by Pollard. He carves it through backward point for f
full_text: Zampa to Pollard, , overpitched outside off and it's been put away by Pollard. He carves it through backward point for four

short_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, 1 run, floated up just outside off, driven to long-off
full_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, 1 run, floated up just outside off, driven to long-off

short_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, no run, flat at the stumps, scoots through and almost accounts for Hetmyer who somehow gets an inside
full_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, no run, flat at the stumps, scoots through and almost accounts for Hetmyer who somehow gets an inside edge on it

short_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, no run, slightly short outside off, Hetmyer cuts to point
full_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, no run, slightly short outside off, Hetmyer cuts to point

short_text: Zampa to Pollard, 1 run, nudges this through midwicket
full_text: Zampa to Pollard, 1 run, nudges this through midwicket

short_text: Zampa to Pollard, no run, ! Pollard drills a full toss right back at Zampa who manages to get his hands to it and it wou
full_text: Zampa to Pollard, no run, ! Pollard drills a full toss right back at Zampa who manages to get his hands to it and it would've been a comfortable rebound had he not been on the floor. It ballooned in the air after Zampa's first attempt, and then landed behind him. He tried crawling back but couldln't get to it. Superb effort nevertheless. It was travelling

short_text: Starc to Hetmyer, 2 runs, fiery yorker on middle, 142kph, and Hetmyer almost overbalances in an attempt to dig it out. M
full_text: Starc to Hetmyer, 2 runs, fiery yorker on middle, 142kph, and Hetmyer almost overbalances in an attempt to dig it out. Manages to somehow squeezes it wide of fine leg for a couple

short_text: Starc to Pollard, leg byes, 1 run, speared in full on leg, Pollard's late on the flick and it deflects off the pad behin
full_text: Starc to Pollard, leg byes, 1 run, speared in full on leg, Pollard's late on the flick and it deflects off the pad behind square

short_text: Starc to Pollard, , short down leg, Pollard lets it go
full_text: Starc to Pollard, , short down leg, Pollard lets it go

short_text: Starc to Pollard, no run, Starc asks the question. Not out is the response. It's a slower off-cutter pitching on a good
full_text: Starc to Pollard, no run, Starc asks the question. Not out is the response. It's a slower off-cutter pitching on a good length on leg, draws Pollard forward in defence but sneaks past the inside edge to the back pad. May have pitched outside the line. Height was an issue too

short_text: Starc to Pollard, 2 runs, full ball on middle and leg, flicked nicely through midwicket for a couple
full_text: Starc to Pollard, 2 runs, full ball on middle and leg, flicked nicely through midwicket for a couple

short_text: Starc to Hetmyer, 1 run, full on middle, Hetmyer eases it down to long-on
full_text: Starc to Hetmyer, 1 run, full on middle, Hetmyer eases it down to long-on

short_text: Starc to Hetmyer, no run, fuller length just outside off, driven to short cover
full_text: Starc to Hetmyer, no run, fuller length just outside off, driven to short cover

short_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, 1 run, an appeal for leg-before but it's too leg-sidish. Already have had one horrendous review. They'
full_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, 1 run, an appeal for leg-before but it's too leg-sidish. Already have had one horrendous review. They're not interested this time. Flat on leg, Hetmyer misses the flick as the ball turns into the pad

short_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, , googly down leg, Hetmyer fails to glance it away
full_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, , googly down leg, Hetmyer fails to glance it away

short_text: Zampa to Pollard, 1 run, quite full outside off, almost yorker length, Pollard squeezes it down to long-off
full_text: Zampa to Pollard, 1 run, quite full outside off, almost yorker length, Pollard squeezes it down to long-off

short_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, 1 run, steers this through backward point
full_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, 1 run, steers this through backward point

short_text: Zampa to Lewis, Caught by Smith!! Maybe a slight misjudgement from Smith, just a slight one, but he's got such a great p
full_text: Zampa to Lewis, Caught by Smith!! Maybe a slight misjudgement from Smith, just a slight one, but he's got such a great pair of hands. Plunges forward and makes it look comfortable coming in from long-on. A googly flighted up on leg, turns away and finds the outside half of the bat as Lewis slices it up.

short_text: Zampa to Lewis, , 89kph, pushes it through down leg and it's been met with a ferocious sweep backward of square
full_text: Zampa to Lewis, , 89kph, pushes it through down leg and it's been met with a ferocious sweep backward of square

short_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, 1 run, shimmies down and flicks off the pads through midwicket
full_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, 1 run, shimmies down and flicks off the pads through midwicket

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Lewis, no run, left alone outside off, hoping for a wide. But the umpire thinks it's fine
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Lewis, no run, left alone outside off, hoping for a wide. But the umpire thinks it's fine

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Hetmyer, 1 run, drags the pull through midwicket
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Hetmyer, 1 run, drags the pull through midwicket

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Hetmyer, , slower ball outside off, Hetmyer goes hard on the drive and hammers it down the ground. War
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Hetmyer, , slower ball outside off, Hetmyer goes hard on the drive and hammers it down the ground. Warner got to it running to his left at long-off. He'll be disappointed at not being able to cut it off

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Lewis, 1 run, yorker length outside off, squeezed through point
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Lewis, 1 run, yorker length outside off, squeezed through point

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Hetmyer, 1 run, pitched up at the stumps, driven to long-off
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Hetmyer, 1 run, pitched up at the stumps, driven to long-off

full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Lewis, 1 run, overpitched outside off, squeezed through cover

short_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, no run, flat on off, punched into the off-side
full_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, no run, flat on off, punched into the off-side

short_text: Zampa to Lewis, leg byes, 1 run, flat on leg, Lewis misses the pull and it deflects off his thigh wide of the keeper. He
full_text: Zampa to Lewis, leg byes, 1 run, flat on leg, Lewis misses the pull and it deflects off his thigh wide of the keeper. He's been called through for a single by the non-striker, but Lewis doesn't take off immediately. Wade charges across, picks up and has a shy at the non-striker's end.

short_text: Zampa to Lewis, no run, googly down leg, Lewis misses the sweep and is hit on the pad
full_text: Zampa to Lewis, no run, googly down leg, Lewis misses the sweep and is hit on the pad

full_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, 1 run, floated up on middle, Hetmyer nudges it through midwicket

full_text: Zampa to Lewis, 1 run, flat on leg, turning back in, Lewis eases it through midwicket

full_text: Zampa to Hetmyer, 1 run, flighted up on off, Hetmyer knocks it to long-off

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Lewis, no run, full and wide, Lewis wants to launch down the ground but it's beaten him with the angle
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Lewis, no run, full and wide, Lewis wants to launch down the ground but it's beaten him with the angle

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Hetmyer, 1 run, short of length into the body, pulled to deep backward square
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Hetmyer, 1 run, short of length into the body, pulled to deep backward square

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Lewis, 1 run, finds the blockhole outside off, squeezed away through point
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Lewis, 1 run, finds the blockhole outside off, squeezed away through point

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Lewis, no run, slower ball across off, Lewis misses the pull and it deflects off the pad to the keeper
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Lewis, no run, slower ball across off, Lewis misses the pull and it deflects off the pad to the keeper. Think it was comfortably missing off but Australia have gone for a . It's a terrible one. Impact itself is six inches outside off

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Lewis, no run, yorker length just outside off, squeezed to backward point
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Lewis, no run, yorker length just outside off, squeezed to backward point

short_text: Mitchell Marsh to Hetmyer, 1 run, full around off, driven to long-off
full_text: Mitchell Marsh to Hetmyer, 1 run, full around off, driven to long-off

short_text: Maxwell to Lewis, no run, 91kph, pushed through on a length just outside off, it's not short enough or wide enough for t
full_text: Maxwell to Lewis, no run, 91kph, pushed through on a length just outside off, it's not short enough or wide enough for the cut and Lewis chops it off a thick under-edge into the covers

short_text: Maxwell to Lewis, no run, length ball on middle, flat through the air, Lewis blocks it from the crease to mid-on
full_text: Maxwell to Lewis, no run, length ball on middle, flat through the air, Lewis blocks it from the crease to mid-on

short_text: Maxwell to Lewis, , short on leg stump, sliding in, and it's been dispatched to the boundary by Lewis. Goes back in the
full_text: Maxwell to Lewis, , short on leg stump, sliding in, and it's been dispatched to the boundary by Lewis. Goes back in the crease to pull it past short fine

short_text: Maxwell to Hetmyer, 1 run, goes back in the crease to work this length ball through midwicket
full_text: Maxwell to Hetmyer, 1 run, goes back in the crease to work this length ball through midwicket

short_text: Maxwell to Hetmyer, no run, length ball turning away from off, blocked down the pitch
full_text: Maxwell to Hetmyer, no run, length ball turning away from off, blocked down the pitch

full_text: Maxwell to Lewis, 1 run, drops it short outside off, Lewis cuts wide of backward point

short_text: Cummins to Hetmyer, no run, not all that short enough to pull, Hetmyer mistimes it to square leg
full_text: Cummins to Hetmyer, no run, not all that short enough to pull, Hetmyer mistimes it to square leg

short_text: Cummins to Hetmyer, , good length outside off, driven nicely on the up to find the gap through cover-point. Has been tim
full_text: Cummins to Hetmyer, , good length outside off, driven nicely on the up to find the gap through cover-point. Has been timed well enough to run away to the ropes

short_text: Cummins to Lewis, 1 run, pitched up on leg, Lewis drags it off a thick inside edge through square leg. Wanted to go down
full_text: Cummins to Lewis, 1 run, pitched up on leg, Lewis drags it off a thick inside edge through square leg. Wanted to go down the ground there

short_text: Cummins to Lewis, no run, slower ball cutting away from a length across off, Lewis steers to point
full_text: Cummins to Lewis, no run, slower ball cutting away from a length across off, Lewis steers to point

short_text: Cummins to Hetmyer, 1 run, short of length outside off, steered past short third who's pretty fine. Australia have a dee
full_text: Cummins to Hetmyer, 1 run, short of length outside off, steered past short third who's pretty fine. Australia have a deep backward point in place as well

short_text: Cummins to Lewis, 1 run, full on the pads, flicked to deep square leg
full_text: Cummins to Lewis, 1 run, full on the pads, flicked to deep square leg

short_text: Hazlewood to Hetmyer, no run, fuller than a length on off, Hetmyer punches towards mid-off
full_text: Hazlewood to Hetmyer, no run, fuller than a length on off, Hetmyer punches towards mid-off

short_text: Hazlewood to Lewis, 1 run, back of a length on leg, Lewis tucks it wide of mid-on
full_text: Hazlewood to Lewis, 1 run, back of a length on leg, Lewis tucks it wide of mid-on

short_text: Hazlewood to Hetmyer, 1 run, short of length outside off, dabbed past backward point to deep third
full_text: Hazlewood to Hetmyer, 1 run, short of length outside off, dabbed past backward point to deep third

short_text: Hazlewood to Roston Chase, Bowled!! What a beauty! On the fuller side just outside off, and it tempts Chase into an ambi
full_text: Hazlewood to Roston Chase, Bowled!! What a beauty! On the fuller side just outside off, and it tempts Chase into an ambitious drive despite being new at the crease. He tries lofting it through the line. But it nips in a touch, goes past the inside edge and knocks over the top of off.

short_text: Hazlewood to Roston Chase, no run, short of length across off, steered towards point
full_text: Hazlewood to Roston Chase, no run, short of length across off, steered towards point

short_text: Hazlewood to Pooran, Caught by Mitchell Marsh!! Short of length just outside off, Pooran flashes hard but slices it stra
full_text: Hazlewood to Pooran, Caught by Mitchell Marsh!! Short of length just outside off, Pooran flashes hard but slices it straight to cover point. It climbed on him perhaps, hitting high on the bat. So Hazlewood's come back well after his first over went for 19. That extra bounce in play for him again as he pounds the pitch hard.

short_text: Cummins to Lewis, no run, good length on off, defended into the off-side
full_text: Cummins to Lewis, no run, good length on off, defended into the off-side

short_text: Cummins to Pooran, leg byes, 1 run, good length delivery on leg, hits Pooran on the pad and rolls into the off-side. Had
full_text: Cummins to Pooran, leg byes, 1 run, good length delivery on leg, hits Pooran on the pad and rolls into the off-side. Had comfortably pitched outside the line

short_text: Cummins to Pooran, , overpitched on off, Pooran gets his front foot down and drives crisply through mid-on
full_text: Cummins to Pooran, , overpitched on off, Pooran gets his front foot down and drives crisply through mid-on

short_text: Cummins to Pooran, no run, length ball on middle, 138kph, Pooran glances it to short fine
full_text: Cummins to Pooran, no run, length ball on middle, 138kph, Pooran glances it to short fine

short_text: Cummins to Gayle, Bowled!! Cummins hits back immediately as Gayle drags on! Full across off, Gayle tries launching it do
full_text: Cummins to Gayle, Bowled!! Cummins hits back immediately as Gayle drags on! Full across off, Gayle tries launching it down the ground again. But all he manages is an inside edge. Australia break the opening stand before it gets out of control. Is that the last time we see Gayle in West Indies colours? He walks off raising his bat to the crowd.

short_text: Cummins to Gayle, , slower ball across off, sits up nicely from a short of length and Gayle hammers the pull over long-o
full_text: Cummins to Gayle, , slower ball across off, sits up nicely from a short of length and Gayle hammers the pull over long-on. West Indies off to a flier

short_text: Hazlewood to Gayle, leg byes, 1 run, short of length on leg, cramping him up. It deflects off the thigh pad as Gayle loo
full_text: Hazlewood to Gayle, leg byes, 1 run, short of length on leg, cramping him up. It deflects off the thigh pad as Gayle looks to tuck it round the corner

short_text: Hazlewood to Gayle, , hits the pitch on a short of length, Gayle stands tall and bludgeons the pull over midwicket. Hazl
full_text: Hazlewood to Gayle, , hits the pitch on a short of length, Gayle stands tall and bludgeons the pull over midwicket. Hazlewood's being taken to the cleaners in his first over

short_text: Hazlewood to Lewis, 1 run, pulls gently through midwicket
full_text: Hazlewood to Lewis, 1 run, pulls gently through midwicket

short_text: Hazlewood to Lewis, , three in a row! Pitched up on off again, this time Lewis gets hold of the lofted shot down the gro
full_text: Hazlewood to Lewis, , three in a row! Pitched up on off again, this time Lewis gets hold of the lofted shot down the ground and clears the infield comfortably

short_text: Hazlewood to Lewis, , goes fuller on off at 138kph, Lewis swings hard and gets a thick inside edge that runs away past s
full_text: Hazlewood to Lewis, , goes fuller on off at 138kph, Lewis swings hard and gets a thick inside edge that runs away past short fine

short_text: Hazlewood to Lewis, , short of length at the body, Lewis smashes the pull over square leg. This was 137kph, getting only
full_text: Hazlewood to Lewis, , short of length at the body, Lewis smashes the pull over square leg. This was 137kph, getting only as high as the waist, not much of a bother for Lewis

short_text: Starc to Gayle, no run, back of a length on middle, blocked down the pitch
full_text: Starc to Gayle, no run, back of a length on middle, blocked down the pitch

short_text: Starc to Gayle, no run, good length delivery in the channel, 141kph, Gayle is happy to leave
full_text: Starc to Gayle, no run, good length delivery in the channel, 141kph, Gayle is happy to leave

short_text: Starc to Gayle, no run, back of a length delivery curving away outside off, left alone
full_text: Starc to Gayle, no run, back of a length delivery curving away outside off, left alone

short_text: Starc to Lewis, leg byes, 1 run, back of a length on leg, skids on sharply to hit Lewis on the thigh as he's late on the
full_text: Starc to Lewis, leg byes, 1 run, back of a length on leg, skids on sharply to hit Lewis on the thigh as he's late on the attempted clip

short_text: Starc to Gayle, 1 run, jams out a near yorker in front of mid-off and across for a single
full_text: Starc to Gayle, 1 run, jams out a near yorker in front of mid-off and across for a single

short_text: Starc to Gayle, 2 runs, pitched right up and swinging away just outside off, Gayle looks to push through the covers but
full_text: Starc to Gayle, 2 runs, pitched right up and swinging away just outside off, Gayle looks to push through the covers but drags it off a thick inside edge backward of square

short_text: Roston Chase to Warner, , fired it on the leg stump, Warner glances and Gayle can't stick his left hand out in time for
full_text: Roston Chase to Warner, , fired it on the leg stump, Warner glances and Gayle can't stick his left hand out in time for the catch. and they have done a huge favor on their NRR too. Warner fist pumps

short_text: Roston Chase to Warner, no run, fires it in on the leg stump, Warner digs it out behind square. He looks for a run, but
full_text: Roston Chase to Warner, no run, fires it in on the leg stump, Warner digs it out behind square. He looks for a run, but West Indies scream to stop the run

short_text: Gayle to Mitchell Marsh, Caught by Holder!! In the airrrr and taken! Chris Gayle does sign off with a wicket. Look at hi
full_text: Gayle to Mitchell Marsh, Caught by Holder!! In the airrrr and taken! Chris Gayle does sign off with a wicket. Look at him run like a kid. He runs and jumps on Mitch Marsh's back to say thank you. Friendly smile back from Marsh. Slot ball, floated full and outside off stump, Marsh thought he could finish with a boundary but he picked out mid-off to perfection and out come some loud screams from grown up men. They are properly enjoying this.

short_text: Gayle to Warner, 1 run, flatter delivery, knocked to deep square leg
full_text: Gayle to Warner, 1 run, flatter delivery, knocked to deep square leg

short_text: Gayle to Warner, 2 runs, knocked behind square on the on-side, Warner rushes back for the second run with a dive
full_text: Gayle to Warner, 2 runs, knocked behind square on the on-side, Warner rushes back for the second run with a dive

short_text: Gayle to Warner, 2 runs, lofted over cover, back for two
full_text: Gayle to Warner, 2 runs, lofted over cover, back for two

short_text: Gayle to Warner, , ohhh Pooran has missed a stumping. Gayle runs all the way to Warner and tells something. All fun out
full_text: Gayle to Warner, , ohhh Pooran has missed a stumping. Gayle runs all the way to Warner and tells something. All fun out there. Gayle fired this down leg seeing Warner advance and it could have been a wicket for him

short_text: Gayle to Warner, no run, chopped to short third man
full_text: Gayle to Warner, no run, chopped to short third man

short_text: Gayle to Warner, , this is surely a wide down leg. But Gayle screaaams funnily in an appeal
full_text: Gayle to Warner, , this is surely a wide down leg. But Gayle screaaams funnily in an appeal

short_text: Gayle to Warner, no run, oh ho ho! Warner was shaping up for the reverse sweep, then changes his shot to a normal pull s
full_text: Gayle to Warner, no run, oh ho ho! Warner was shaping up for the reverse sweep, then changes his shot to a normal pull shot as Gayle loops it slow outside off stump, Warner misses. Asks for the wide. Ump tells him he was looking for the reverse sweep so it's not a wide

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, 1 run, low full toss, Warner digs it out to long-off
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, 1 run, low full toss, Warner digs it out to long-off

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, , shortish and on the leg stump, Warner pulls, holds the pose and that means he's met this so we
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, , shortish and on the leg stump, Warner pulls, holds the pose and that means he's met this so well. Clears backward square leg comfortably. Picked the slower ball and smashed it

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, , oh my word! Warner shaped up for the switch hit so early, waited for the slower ball to come,
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, , oh my word! Warner shaped up for the switch hit so early, waited for the slower ball to come, Bravo tried to take it wide of off stump but Warner has smashed it over point. Bravo can only smile

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, wide full delivery outside off stump, Marsh toe-ends the slap to mid-off
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, wide full delivery outside off stump, Marsh toe-ends the slap to mid-off

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, leg byes, 2 runs, low full toss, Marsh misses the flick, the ball rolls to square leg, n
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, leg byes, 2 runs, low full toss, Marsh misses the flick, the ball rolls to square leg, no one there and it's Gayle who is giving chase from short fine leg, Bravo himself had to go so the second was easily on

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, 2 runs, slower delivery on the leg stump, Marsh drags the slog to long leg, cut off with
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, 2 runs, slower delivery on the leg stump, Marsh drags the slog to long leg, cut off with a dive

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, , oh that's harsh on the bowler. The yorker probably would have smashed Marsh on the boo
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, , oh that's harsh on the bowler. The yorker probably would have smashed Marsh on the boot had he stayed put, Marsh got inside the line and missed the flick shot, past leg stump and called wide

short_text: Holder to Warner, no run, beaten on the outside edge, slower delivery wide of off stump, Warner swings and misses
full_text: Holder to Warner, no run, beaten on the outside edge, slower delivery wide of off stump, Warner swings and misses

short_text: Holder to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, low full toss on the stumps, Marsh knocks it to long-on and raises his bat having compl
full_text: Holder to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, low full toss on the stumps, Marsh knocks it to long-on and raises his bat having completed his . First fifty in T20 World Cups for him

short_text: Holder to Mitchell Marsh, , you got to be kidding me. It's another yorker, it's another mightly swing across the line, i
full_text: Holder to Mitchell Marsh, , you got to be kidding me. It's another yorker, it's another mightly swing across the line, it's another outside edge that has this time flown over Gayle at short third man. Unfair for the bowler

short_text: Holder to Mitchell Marsh, , outside edge and it is escaping past the keeper. Holder bowls the wide full delivery, Marsh
full_text: Holder to Mitchell Marsh, , outside edge and it is escaping past the keeper. Holder bowls the wide full delivery, Marsh swings hard, gets a thick edge and it splits Pooran and Gayle (short third man) perfectly

short_text: Holder to Warner, 1 run, yorker on the leg stump, Warner drags this to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Holder to Warner, 1 run, yorker on the leg stump, Warner drags this to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Holder to Warner, , this time Holder fires it too wide of off stump
full_text: Holder to Warner, , this time Holder fires it too wide of off stump

short_text: Holder to Warner, no run, Warner tries the reverse sweep and misses. Looks like he wanted to take his SRH teammate on. B
full_text: Holder to Warner, no run, Warner tries the reverse sweep and misses. Looks like he wanted to take his SRH teammate on. But Holder foxed him with a short slower delivery

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, 1 run, slower delivery outside off stump, Warner drives to deep cover
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, 1 run, slower delivery outside off stump, Warner drives to deep cover

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, , oh brilliant from Warner. Spoils a really good over. Good wide yorker with a field set, they h
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, , oh brilliant from Warner. Spoils a really good over. Good wide yorker with a field set, they have a cover-point and Warner beats the dive there. No fielder square on the off-side so it's four

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, full and on the leg stump, Marsh flicks it uppishly, hit on the bounce to deep ba
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, full and on the leg stump, Marsh flicks it uppishly, hit on the bounce to deep backward square leg

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, no run, oh mighty slog across the line from Marsh, missed the slower ball by a mile on t
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, no run, oh mighty slog across the line from Marsh, missed the slower ball by a mile on the angle across from round the wicket

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, 1 run, wide slower ball outside off stump, Warner slaps it to deep cover. Was uppish but no one
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, 1 run, wide slower ball outside off stump, Warner slaps it to deep cover. Was uppish but no one inside the circle

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, , this has to be wide though. Slow and too wide. Warner thought of sweep first, then changed to
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, , this has to be wide though. Slow and too wide. Warner thought of sweep first, then changed to off-side, then realized no point playing, let me leave it

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, no run, brilliant slower ball yorker wide of off stump, Warner lets it go
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, no run, brilliant slower ball yorker wide of off stump, Warner lets it go

full_text: Russell to Warner, 1 run, slower delivery outside off stump, Warner toe-ends it to short third man

full_text: Russell to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, low full toss, Marsh flicks through backward square leg

short_text: Russell to Warner, 1 run, full and outside off stump, Warner squeezes it square of the wicket on the off-side
full_text: Russell to Warner, 1 run, full and outside off stump, Warner squeezes it square of the wicket on the off-side

short_text: Russell to Warner, , oh Dre Russ, got to feel for you. He's bowled a really good short ball that troubled Warner and for
full_text: Russell to Warner, , oh Dre Russ, got to feel for you. He's bowled a really good short ball that troubled Warner and forced him to duck for cover, but the ball takes the thick top edge and flies over short fine leg. Hey Russ, haven't you done all this yourself with the bat?

short_text: Russell to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, flicked to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Russell to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, flicked to deep mid-wicket

full_text: Russell to Warner, 1 run, oh brilliant yorker on the leg stump, again a hit of inward shape, dug out to point

full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, 1 run, very full and wide of off stump, Warner digs it out to deep cover

full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, no run, oh . Back over the wicket for a slower ball angling across, Warner swings hard and misses

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, wide full delivery, Marsh drives straight to deep cover
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, wide full delivery, Marsh drives straight to deep cover

full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, no run, firm drive to mid-off, was full and in the slot, straight to the fielder

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, 2 runs, full and wide of off stump, Marsh drives to deep extra-cover. Davey Warner is qu
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, 2 runs, full and wide of off stump, Marsh drives to deep extra-cover. Davey Warner is quick to get back for two

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, 2 runs, full and on the leg stump, tucked wide of Pollard at long-on and they race back
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, 2 runs, full and on the leg stump, tucked wide of Pollard at long-on and they race back to raise Australia's 100

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, , here's DJ Bravo returning from round the wicket and angling it across, too wide says u
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, , here's DJ Bravo returning from round the wicket and angling it across, too wide says ump. Harsh call?

short_text: Russell to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, really full delivery, Marsh digs it out to long-off
full_text: Russell to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, really full delivery, Marsh digs it out to long-off

short_text: Russell to Mitchell Marsh, , oh this game is cruel on the bowler at times. Russell has bowled a very good outswinging yo
full_text: Russell to Mitchell Marsh, , oh this game is cruel on the bowler at times. Russell has bowled a very good outswinging yorker, intresting to see the ball still move in the air, surprised Marsh jammed his bat down, got a thick outside edge and escaped past short third man

short_text: Russell to Mitchell Marsh, , and again. This time even worse. First with the ball being a full toss, and then Akeal Hose
full_text: Russell to Mitchell Marsh, , and again. This time even worse. First with the ball being a full toss, and then Akeal Hosein fumbling the ball to a boundary when it should have been only one run. Same shot from Marsh, straight to the fielder, but through him

short_text: Russell to Mitchell Marsh, , whipped away quite powerfully. Russell knows he has bowled a bad ball. Full and angling dow
full_text: Russell to Mitchell Marsh, , whipped away quite powerfully. Russell knows he has bowled a bad ball. Full and angling down leg, something he will maraud himself, Marsh with a strong bottom hand grip picks it up for a flat hit over long leg

short_text: Russell to Warner, 1 run, looks to cut hard, but chops this short of length delivery towards point.
full_text: Russell to Warner, 1 run, looks to cut hard, but chops this short of length delivery towards point.

short_text: Russell to Warner, no run, oh swing and a miss. Fullish slower delivery, as slow as 106kph, Warner swings hard and misse
full_text: Russell to Warner, no run, oh swing and a miss. Fullish slower delivery, as slow as 106kph, Warner swings hard and misses

short_text: Hayden Walsh to Warner, 1 run, shortish delivery, Warner pulls it to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Hayden Walsh to Warner, 1 run, shortish delivery, Warner pulls it to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Hayden Walsh to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, short and on the leg stump, Marsh pulls it to deep mid-wicket. Loud "Noooo" from
full_text: Hayden Walsh to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, short and on the leg stump, Marsh pulls it to deep mid-wicket. Loud "Noooo" from Warner for the second run

full_text: Hayden Walsh to Mitchell Marsh, no run, flatter in trajectory, Marsh defends

full_text: Hayden Walsh to Warner, 1 run, knocked to deep square leg

short_text: Hayden Walsh to Warner, 2 runs, short delivery, Warner pulls it through deep square leg and spirnts back for two to comp
full_text: Hayden Walsh to Warner, 2 runs, short delivery, Warner pulls it through deep square leg and spirnts back for two to complete his fifty. Gentle raise of the bat. Warner standing tall in a must-win game

short_text: Hayden Walsh to Warner, , do not bowl in the slot to Davey Warner even if you have 100 tricks up your sleeve. Freebie fu
full_text: Hayden Walsh to Warner, , do not bowl in the slot to Davey Warner even if you have 100 tricks up your sleeve. Freebie full ball, didn't matter if it was the googly, solid base from Warner after opening his front leg up, slogged high and deep over mid-wicket

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Mitchell Marsh, no run, flatter delivery on the stumps, Marsh defends
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Mitchell Marsh, no run, flatter delivery on the stumps, Marsh defends

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Warner, 1 run, "catch it, catch it," is the cry from Pooran behind the sticks but Warner is very lucky t
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Warner, 1 run, "catch it, catch it," is the cry from Pooran behind the sticks but Warner is very lucky that this top edge lands safely at mid-on. Warner wanting to pull off the back foot, but this short ball rushed him and he escaped big time

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, on the leg stump, Marsh knocks it to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, on the leg stump, Marsh knocks it to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Mitchell Marsh, , in the airrr, has he timed this? Yes, clears long-off. Spinning away from the right-ha
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Mitchell Marsh, , in the airrr, has he timed this? Yes, clears long-off. Spinning away from the right-hander, but was close to Marsh who jumped out and played a nice lofted drive. Intent very clear from Marsh

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Warner, 1 run, Warner goes for the reverse sweep and gets a thick inside edge onto pad, and that negates
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Warner, 1 run, Warner goes for the reverse sweep and gets a thick inside edge onto pad, and that negates the LBW review

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, brings out the reverse sweep again but Hayden Walsh does brillliantly to stretch and stop the ball

full_text: Hayden Walsh to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, goes back and looks to pull hard, mistimes to mid-wicket

full_text: Hayden Walsh to Warner, 1 run, googly on the stumps, Warner goes back and tucks it to deep mid-wicket

full_text: Hayden Walsh to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, Marsh looks to muscle the pull shot, luckily hits it on the bounce to deep mid-wicket. Thought he could nail this short ball, but didn't

short_text: Hayden Walsh to Mitchell Marsh, , plays the reverse sweep as Hayden Walsh bowls short and wide, gets it right and beats
full_text: Hayden Walsh to Mitchell Marsh, , plays the reverse sweep as Hayden Walsh bowls short and wide, gets it right and beats the dive at backward point. No third man

full_text: Hayden Walsh to Warner, leg byes, 1 run, leg-side ball, tucked to short fine leg

full_text: Hayden Walsh to Warner, no run, googly on the leg stump, Warner defends

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Warner, , short, outside off, Warner goes back and chops it out. Plays it late and into the gap for a four

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Warner, no run, spins in, quicker ball, Warner fails to nudge that
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Warner, no run, spins in, quicker ball, Warner fails to nudge that

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Warner, no run, stabs the ball out into the off-side and finds cover point

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Warner, , poor delivery and put away! Slips that down leg and Warner picks the balll up and parcels it o
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Warner, , poor delivery and put away! Slips that down leg and Warner picks the balll up and parcels it over deep fine for a sixer. Huge hit indeed

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, turns that away into the on-side with soft hands for a single

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, slower length delivery and has been tucked wide of long-on for a single. That was
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, slower length delivery and has been tucked wide of long-on for a single. That was slower and nibbled in for the batter to play it away on to the on-side

full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, 1 run, slower delivery and has been pushed away to mid-off for a single

full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, no run, fuller delivery, outside off, driven to the man at cover

full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, no run, backs away and looks to punch it but is undone by the lack of pace. Poked out into the off-side to find mid-off

full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, no run, off-cutter lands on leg and spins away a little for the batter to defend it into the off-side with soft hands

short_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, , Warner has had his mojo back! This man is back at his best and slams one down the ground for a
full_text: Dwayne Bravo to Warner, , Warner has had his mojo back! This man is back at his best and slams one down the ground for a four. Slower, pitched up delivery and Warner lofts it over mid-off. His balance was impeccable

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Mitchell Marsh, no run, flatter delivery and has been punched to the man at cover

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Warner, 1 run, angled in and tucked away into the on-side for a single

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, flatter delivery and has been punched down to long-off for a single. That arrowed in again

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Finch, Bowled!! Chops it on does Finch! That was the in-ducker and Finch tried to dab it but gets an ins
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Finch, Bowled!! Chops it on does Finch! That was the in-ducker and Finch tried to dab it but gets an inside edge for the ball roll on to the sticks. That was a superb delivery indeed and Finch misread the line. Was a little too close to play that. Australia lose their skipper.

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Finch, no run, arrows in, Finch nudges the ball away into the on-side and finds the fielder
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Finch, no run, arrows in, Finch nudges the ball away into the on-side and finds the fielder

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Finch, no run, flatter delivery and has been pushed away into the off-side

short_text: Holder to Warner, , short, outside off, Warner got hold of it and clobbered it over deep mid for a sixer. That was hit h
full_text: Holder to Warner, , short, outside off, Warner got hold of it and clobbered it over deep mid for a sixer. That was hit hard and over the fence. Was timed really well

short_text: Holder to Warner, , edged and four! The extra bounce proved to be disconcerting for the batter who opened the bat's face
full_text: Holder to Warner, , edged and four! The extra bounce proved to be disconcerting for the batter who opened the bat's face but played it too fine. The keeper dived but the ball went away from him. Four more

short_text: Holder to Warner, , short, wide, Warner throws his bat at it and pulls it over mid-on for a four. Didn't time it but did
full_text: Holder to Warner, , short, wide, Warner throws his bat at it and pulls it over mid-on for a four. Didn't time it but did well to get it away over the in-field
